assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer and a connection string
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows exact pattern: .AddOperationalStore(options => { options.ConfigureDbContext = b => b.UseSqlServer(connectionString); }).

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with a persistence method such as PersistKeysToDbContext or PersistKeysToFileSystem
Program.cs calls SetApplicationName with an explicit application name string
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows .SetApplicationName('My.IdentityServer') in the data protection configuration.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not disable automatic key management (KeyManagement.Enabled should remain true or not be set to false)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md's operational store section does not disable key management; it's used alongside automatic key management.
